title: Cat Ears Cosmetic
description: Custom model resource pack adding cat ear cosmetics to the game
body:
Cat ears cosmetics! My oldest custom items are reborn!

Check the gallery for the models!

Version 1.0 was made for vanilla custom models, and should work for 1.14-1.21.1. However, it is NOT survival friendly, the items must be accessed through commands (below). Version 1.1 was made with the item components system, and will work for 1.21.2+. It still may need commands to access the custom items (below x2). It is only survival friendly for 1.21.5, due to the code only being added in this version. It is unknown if this will work for mods such as Optifine or CIT Resewn, I did not make these with those mods in mind.

**Item Model IDs: needed for Version 1.0 (1.14-1.21.1!)**

Desired Item - block (#)

Use the command: /give @p block[​custom_model_data:#]
- carved pumpkin (1) - Black Cat Ears
- carved pumpkin (2) - Cream Cat Ears
- carved pumpkin (3) - Orange Cat Ears
- carved pumpkin (4) - Pink Cat Ears
- carved pumpkin (5) - White Cat Ears

**Item Components - Survival-Friendly Renaming: for 1.21.5+**

Rename CARVED PUMPKIN to one of the following names:
- Black Cat Ears
- Cream Cat Ears
- Orange Cat Ears
- Pink Cat Ears
- White Cat Ears

**Item Components - Command Summoning: **for 1.21.2-1.21.4, and to apply further item components for customizability 1.21.5+

/give @p ANY_ITEM_YOU_WANT[item_model:"becca:json_filename"]
- catears_black
- catears_cream
- catears_orange
- catears_pink
- catears_white
